---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description
Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Describe the expected behavior.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Are there other ways to achieve this?

## 📚 Additional Context
Any relevant information, links, or examples?

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's scope (IDS detection)
- [ ] I've checked if this feature already exists
- [ ] I'm willing to contribute this feature
